name: delete_file
description: Delete a specific version of a file from a Backblaze B2 bucket. You need both the file name and its version-specific file ID. B2 keeps file versions, so this deletes one specific version rather than all versions of the file.

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: The full name of the file to delete (including path prefix).

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The unique file ID of the specific file version to delete.
